title: Cool(酷)
description: Get effect easily.更便捷地获得效果。
body:
### 中文简介

《Cool》模组为 Minecraft 游戏带来了全新的便利功能，支持 1.21.4neoforge 版本。在游戏中按下 C 键，即可获得一个名为“cool”的物品。手持该物品并右键点击，可以打开一个图形用户界面（GUI）。在 GUI 中点击不同的按钮，玩家可以获得多种实用效果，包括瞬间治疗、回复饥饿值、跳跃提升、迅捷、生命恢复、力量、抗火、幸运、中毒、一键自杀、水下呼吸以及缓慢等功能。

#### 功能详解
- **瞬间治疗**：在探索危险的地下洞穴或者与怪物战斗时，玩家可能会受到严重的伤害。此时，只需在 GUI 中点击“瞬间治疗”按钮，即可立即恢复部分生命值，帮助玩家快速摆脱危险，继续冒险。
- **回复饥饿值**：在长时间的探索或建造过程中，玩家的饥饿值会逐渐下降。通过点击“回复饥饿值”按钮，玩家可以迅速补充饥饿值，恢复体力，从而更好地进行挖掘、战斗或建造等操作。
- **跳跃提升**：无论是跨越峡谷、攀登山峰还是在城市建筑之间穿梭，跳跃提升功能都能让玩家轻松应对。点击该按钮后，玩家的跳跃高度会显著增加，帮助玩家快速到达高处或跨越障碍。
- **迅捷**：在需要快速移动时，迅捷效果可以大幅提升玩家的移动速度。无论是追赶怪物、逃离危险还是快速前往目的地，迅捷效果都能让玩家在短时间内覆盖更远的距离。
- **生命恢复**：生命恢复功能可以让玩家在一段时间内持续恢复生命值。这对于长时间的探险或在危险环境中生存非常有帮助，玩家可以更加从容地面对各种挑战。
- **力量**：点击“力量”按钮后，玩家将获得短暂的力量提升效果。在此期间，玩家的攻击力会大幅增加，可以更轻松地击败怪物或破坏方块，尤其适合在战斗或大规模建造时使用。
- **抗火**：在面对火焰或熔岩等危险环境时，抗火功能可以为玩家提供保护。点击“抗火”按钮后，玩家将在一段时间内免疫火焰伤害，包括熔岩的伤害，让玩家能够安全地探索火山、地狱或其他高温区域。
- **幸运**：点击“幸运”按钮后，玩家将获得短暂的幸运效果。在此期间，玩家的采矿效率和物品掉落率会显著提升，更容易获得稀有资源和高价值物品。
- **中毒**：点击“中毒”按钮后，玩家将进入中毒状态。虽然听起来有些危险，但这个功能可以用于测试玩家的生存能力，或者在特定的多人游戏中增加趣味性。中毒状态下，玩家的生命值会逐渐下降，但可以通过其他功能（如瞬间治疗）进行应对。
- **一键自杀**：虽然听起来有些“反人类”，但这个功能在某些情况下非常实用。比如在测试地图时，玩家可能需要快速结束游戏；或者在不小心陷入绝境时，一键自杀可以快速重启游戏，避免浪费时间。
- **水下呼吸**：在探索水下世界时，水下呼吸功能可以让玩家在水下自由呼吸，无需担心溺水。点击该按钮后，玩家将在一段时间内获得水下呼吸效果，可以更轻松地探索沉船、海底遗迹或其他水下区域。
- **缓慢**：点击“缓慢”按钮后，玩家的移动速度将显著降低。虽然听起来有些不便，但这个功能可以在某些情况下增加游戏的趣味性，例如在需要玩家更加谨慎行动的场景中，或者在特定的多人游戏模式中增加挑战性。

#### 模组设计理念
《Cool》模组的设计理念是为玩家提供一个简单、便捷的工具，帮助他们在游戏中更轻松地应对各种挑战。无论是新手玩家还是资深玩家，都可以通过这个模组获得更多的便利和乐趣。模组的界面简洁直观，操作简单易懂，即使是第一次使用模组的玩家也能快速上手。

#### 未来展望
虽然目前《Cool》模组已经提供了多种实用功能，但开发团队仍在不断努力，计划在未来版本中加入更多有趣的功能。

《Cool》模组是一个充满创意和实用性的工具，它不仅可以让玩家在游戏中更加轻松地生存和探索，还能为游戏增添更多的乐趣和多样性。如果你正在寻找一个能够提升游戏体验的模组，那么《Cool》绝对值得一试！

---

### English Introduction

The "Cool" mod introduces a range of new and convenient features to Minecraft, supporting the 1.21.4neoforge version. By pressing the C key in the game, players can obtain an item named "cool." Right-clicking while holding this item will open a graphical user interface (GUI). Within the GUI, players can click on different buttons to access a variety of practical effects, including instant healing, hunger recovery, jump boost, swiftness, health regeneration, strength, fire resistance, luck, poison, one-click suicide, water breathing, and slowness.

#### Function Details
- **Instant Healing**: When exploring dangerous underground caves or fighting monsters, players may suffer severe injuries. By clicking the "Instant Healing" button in the GUI, players can immediately recover a portion of their health, helping them quickly escape danger and continue their adventure.
- **Hunger Recovery**: During long-lasting exploration or building activities, players' hunger levels will gradually decrease. By clicking the "Hunger Recovery" button, players can quickly restore their hunger levels and regain stamina, allowing them to continue mining, fighting, or building more effectively.
- **Jump Boost**: Whether crossing canyons, climbing mountains, or navigating between city buildings, the Jump Boost feature can make it easy for players to overcome obstacles. After clicking this button, players' jump height will significantly increase, helping them reach higher places or cross barriers more easily.
- **Swiftness**: When quick movement is needed, the Swiftness effect can greatly increase players' movement speed. Whether chasing monsters, escaping danger, or quickly reaching a destination, the Swiftness effect allows players to cover longer distances in a short period of time.
- **Health Regeneration**: The Health Regeneration feature allows players to recover health over a period of time. This is very helpful for long-lasting exploration or survival in dangerous environments, enabling players to face various challenges more calmly.
- **Strength**: By clicking the "Strength" button, players will gain a temporary boost in strength. During this period, their attack power will significantly increase, making it easier to defeat monsters or destroy blocks. This feature is particularly useful in combat or large-scale building scenarios.
- **Fire Resistance**: When facing dangerous environments such as fire or lava, the Fire Resistance feature can protect players. By clicking the "Fire Resistance" button, players will become immune to fire damage, including damage from lava, for a short period of time. This allows them to safely explore volcanoes, the Nether, or other high-temperature areas.
- **Luck**: By clicking the "Luck" button, players will gain a temporary boost in luck. During this period, their mining efficiency and item drop rates will significantly increase, making it easier to obtain rare resources and valuable items.
- **Poison**: By clicking the "Poison" button, players will enter a poisoned state. Although this may sound dangerous, this feature can be used to test players' survival skills or add fun to specific multiplayer games. In the poisoned state, players' health will gradually decrease, but they can counteract it with other features (such as instant healing).
- **One-Click Suicide**: Although it may sound "anti-human," this feature can be very useful in certain situations. For example, when testing a map, players may need to end the game quickly; or when accidentally trapped in a hopeless situation, one-click suicide can quickly restart the game and avoid wasting time.
- **Water Breathing**: When exploring underwater worlds, the Water Breathing feature allows players to breathe freely underwater without worrying about drowning. By clicking this button, players will gain the Water Breathing effect for a short period of time, making it easier to explore shipwrecks, underwater ruins, or other underwater areas.
- **Slowness**: By clicking the "Slowness" button, players' movement speed will significantly decrease. Although this may sound inconvenient, this feature can add fun to the game in certain situations, such as in scenarios where players need to be more cautious or in specific multiplayer game modes to increase the challenge.

#### Mod Design Philosophy
The design philosophy of the "Cool" mod is to provide players with a simple and convenient tool to help them more easily face various challenges in the game. Whether for new players or experienced players, this mod can offer more convenience and fun. The mod's interface is simple and intuitive, and the operation is easy to understand. Even players who are using a mod for the first time can quickly get started.

#### Future Outlook
Although the "Cool" mod already offers a variety of practical functions, the development team is still working hard and plans to add more interesting features in future versions.

The "Cool" mod is a creative and practical tool that not only makes it easier for players to survive and explore in the game but also adds more fun and diversity to the game. If you are looking for a mod that can enhance your gaming experience, then "Cool" is definitely worth a try!

(End support at 26/7/2025)（停止支持于2025年7月26日）
